name: Spiced Fruit Chutney
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Firmly packed Golden brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and dice a large Granny Smith apple.
2. Combine first 9 ingredients in a heavy medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
Bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add sugar, pears, apple, cranberries, and currants; stir until sugar dissolves.
5. Cook until fruits are soft and liquid thickens slightly, stirring occasionally (about 1 hour).
6. Cool to room temperature before refrigerating.
Bon Appetit
